arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold breaks silence on Liverpool future - as links to Real Madrid ramp up with his contract up in the summer
arts.sum: The defender has been at the Reds since 2004, breaking into the first team in 2016 and quickly becoming a fan favourite with his pinpoint crosses and dangerous set pieces.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer shares Darwin Nunez theory as pressure grows on under fire Liverpool star
arts.sum: Liverpool striker Darwin Nunez has come under fire this season after struggling for form and there has been some speculation that the club could consider cutting their losses on him

arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Man Utd set surprise Martinez asking price; Liverpool eye bargain Alexander-Arnold sale
arts.sum: Several Bundesliga sides have been knocked back with offers to sign Real Madrid striker Endrick on loan for the remainder of the season. Real Madrid have withdrawn from the race to sign AC Milan left-back Theo Hernandez, handing Man Utd a huge boost in their pursuit of the Frenchman.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold breaks silence on his future at Liverpool
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold’s future at Liverpool has been the subject of conversation at the club. The right-back has entered the final year of his contract at the club and he has still not signed a new deal at Anfield. arts.ttl: Player ‘already negotiating’ with Liverpool and Manchester United – Reds to battle with Amorim’s side
arts.sum: Liverpool could be set for a transfer battle with Manchester United for Brighton & Hove Albion’s João Pedro. Earlier this week, UOL reported the 23-year-old is the priority target for Arne Slot’s side next summer. They also stated the Red Devils are keen on signing the forward who has impressed for Brighton. arts.ttl: Mo Salah’s true colours clear for all to see with Federico Chiesa interaction at Liverpool training
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah has been in sensational form for Liverpool this season, and the Egyptian forward has shown his generosity by offering to cook for new teammate Federico Chiesa

arts.ttl: Liverpool now in the mix for 23-year-old Torino star – Becoming one of most wanted
arts.sum: Liverpool have become the latest club to join the chase for Torino star Samuele Ricci. The midfielder has starred for the Serie A side and his fine displays this season have seen several clubs take notice. La Stampa, relayed by L’interista, state Liverpool are added to the growing list of interested clubs.
